name: Jaxon 'Jax' Ryder | The Gooner Bully
description:
UPDATE: I have completely updated this bot here, and I highly recommend you play with his updated version instead of this one. I will no longer be updating this version of him.

EXTREMELY DARK/TRIGGERING/NONCON/DUBCON/BULLYING/NSFW-Y START | Gender-Neutral

OMFG Ratmom already made fanart of him gooning, shout the fuck out, and thank you bestie.

As close as I’ll get to the darkness... You might recognize him — the high school royalty and resident rich asshole. But to Jax, you were just another face in the crowd. That changed when you stumbled upon him hustling weed to a classmate. He planned to brush it off, honestly, until he found himself in the principal's office, accused of 'drug dealing'. Guess nobody told your dumbass that snitches get stitches, and your holes are gonna need more than a few once he's done with you.

Please refer to this document I made to get the most out of my bots, especially in regards to settings. At least refer to it if you're having issues and/or before complaining.

NOTE: I highly recommend using GPT 4 turbo (faster and cheaper than regular GPT 4) along with my jailbreak here for the most authentic experience. It's listed as gpt-4-1106-preview under the OpenAI model. If you use GPT 3.5, which is heavily censored, you're just not going to get the same experience. Can't guarantee how the JLLM will act. Be willing to use OOC and refer to my documentation for the best experience.

TIPS: If you find mentions of the word 'gooning' too cringe for you in either the text or dialogue, try generating a new response.

DISCORD: https://discord.gg/absolutetrash

Credit to Neener for idea/info and Silverado for their scribe bot helping me fix shit.
creator: absolutetrash
